aboutpara: All while passing all my classes in college, I am also a research equity analyst for the Student Managed Investment Fund on campus, and a board member across several clubs. However, those things were never what I was truly passionate about. Since being a bored kid during the Covid pandemic, I've been creating cinematic videos with clean cuts, color grading, and sound design to make videos ascend from simple moving frames to actual stories. Additionally, I have built websites and apps with a seamless backend and frontend. Creativity fuels and drives me. So here I am, making the little kid in me happy again 😌
